title: String interpolation desugaring to concatenation
body:
Added **string interpolation** surface syntax and **desugared** it to binary concatenation expressions in HIR so type checking and lowering only handle core operators.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`df0657c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/df0657c)
- **Subject:** Add string interpolation support with desugaring to binary concatenation expressions
- **Completed:** 2026-02-28

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Same desugar-first pattern as for-loop normalization—keeps the semantic core small while improving author ergonomics. Language-meta spike carried forward into Beskid grammar/platform-spec discussions.

source.subject: Add string interpolation support with desugaring to binary concatenation expressions
